_readme: Per-agent graduation state. Copy to state.json to start. mode: 'approval-queue' means the agent's output waits for the operator; 'auto' means it may act unattended. THE ORCHESTRATOR NEVER FLIPS A MODE ITSELF — run.py only reports GRADUATION-ELIGIBLE in the log; the operator edits this file by hand to graduate an agent. non_graduating:true agents can never leave approval-queue no matter what.

pipeline.note: produces + queues for approval; publishing is gated downstream by publisher-queue

grader.note: gate agent — its output is grades, not posts

publisher-queue.note: HARD RULE: even at 100% approvals the orchestrator only logs eligibility. Publishing without per-post approval requires the operator editing this file themselves.
